description: Beginning or address of a letter, to Eliyyahu the judge and Zekharya (or this Zekharya is simply the name of Eliyyahu's father); with Arabic jottings in the margin on recto and on verso. None of the content is preserved. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
